summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Locofast footer and 7 static pages. All features implemented correctly with proper navigation and content.
passed_tests: Footer displays correctly with offices section (6 locations including Bangladesh)
Footer appears consistently on all pages (home, fabrics, about, contact, faq, privacy, terms, customers, suppliers, media, careers)
All footer navigation links work correctly
FAQ page loads with 10 comprehensive FAQ items and contact CTA
Privacy Policy page loads with complete legal content and proper structure
Terms of Use page loads with comprehensive terms and conditions
Customers page loads with buyer benefits, process flow, and CTA to fabrics
Suppliers page loads with seller benefits, requirements, and contact CTA
Media & Awards page loads with press releases and company overview
Careers page loads with work environment, departments, and email CTA
All 4 social media links (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, YouTube) present and properly configured
Internal navigation between all pages functions correctly
Admin link in footer navigates to admin login page
Copyright notice displays correctly with company name
New Delhi office properly marked as Headquarters
Contact information (phone, email) properly linked in footer
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All 13 required features working correctly
